title: Public Cloud Storage-Like Surface Detected
description: A publicly reachable cloud storage-style endpoint was detected on the external perimeter.
impact: Public storage endpoints can expose data directly or reveal naming, metadata, and access patterns useful for further attack-path development.
likelihood: Medium to High depending on whether access controls are enforced and what content is exposed.
recommendations: Validate whether public access is intentional and necessary.
Review bucket/container policy, object ACLs, and listing behavior.
Confirm whether the endpoint exposes sensitive data or metadata.
